## Properties

| Property    | Attribute    | Description                                             | Type      | Default   |
| ----------- | ------------ | ------------------------------------------------------- | --------- | --------- |
| `alt`       | `alt`        | Alternative text for the avatar image.                  | `string`  | `""`      |

| `imageUrl`  | `image-url`  | Image URL used for the avatar.                          | `string`  | `""`      |
| `showLabel` | `show-label` | Whether to show the user name label next to the avatar. | `boolean` | `true`    |
| `target`    | `target`     | Where to open the link (same tab, new tab, etc.).       | `string`  | `"_self"` |
| `userName`  | `user-name`  | Displayed user name associated with the avatar.         | `string`  | `""`      |
